nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings in lesson planning
nodes.grounding_span: saved my time in editing, but also in student questions

nodes.label: Teacher authenticity and professional identity
nodes.grounding_span: I know that it does not understand that sometimes when things are too heavy or depressing students need a way to release

nodes.label: Cultural authenticity and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: Indigenous people have been misrepresented since the 15th century. I'd hate for AI to continue that

nodes.label: Acceptance of AI as ethical learning tool
nodes.grounding_span: I would like my students to have a deeper understanding of how to use it ethically and well
